pi_items.metadata_value: A Method for the Construction of Minimum-Redundancy Codes
pi_items.verified_value: A Method for the Construction of Minimum-Redundancy Codes
On Computable Numbers, with an Application to the Entscheidungsproblem

privileged_info_summary: Task exports three classic papers to BibTeX: Shannon's 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' (1948) from Bell System Technical Journal, Huffman's 'A Method for the Construction of Minimum-Redundancy Codes' (1952) from Proceedings of the IRE, and Turing's 'On Computable Numbers, with an Application to the Entscheidungsproblem' (1936) from Proceedings of the London Mathematical Society. The output file is saved to /home/ga/Documents/info_theory_foundations.bib. Paper data is synthetically generated via seed_library.py, which populates the Zotero SQLite database with 18 items. The Turing paper title in metadata is truncated (metadata shows 'On Computable Numbers' instead of the full title with subtitle). File verification checks for BibTeX format, exactly 3 entries, and presence of author keywords (Shannon, Huffman, Turing).
